title: PerWorldCommands
description: Put a command for a world.
body:
# PerWorldCommands
Visit my discord server: https://discord.tonimatas.dev/

## Description:
With this plugin you can put commands by worlds. Example: / plugins you put that it is only available in the world "world_nether", that command will only be executed in that world.

## Features:
- Compatible with all versions higher than 1.8
- Easy to use/configure.
- None error
- All the commands of all Minecraft plugins work. Even mods (If you use Magma / Mohist ...)

## Commands:
 - /pwc reload
 - /pwc version
 - /pwc cmd set <example> <worlds>
 - /pwc cmd remove <example>
 - /perworldcommands reload
 - /perworldcommands version
 - /perworldcommands cmd set <example> <worlds>
 - /perworldcommands cmd remove <example>

## Permissions:
### Command permissions:
 - perworldcommands.cmd
 - pwc.cmd

### Bypass permissions:
 - perworldcommands.bypass
 - pwc.bypass
